sections.biography-sanguo-yanyi: Used by Cai Mao to guard the east gate in case Liu Bei slipped through his plot. Later, after Cai Mao was executed by Cao Cao, Cai He was sent with Cai Zhong as pretend defectors to spy on Wu but Zhou Yu and his officers saw through the ploy. full_text:
Cai He 蔡和
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cai He (蔡和)was born in Nan. Cai Mao’s brother. Surrendered to Wu before Chibi, but executed by Zhou Yu. Cai He is a fictional character. Cai He was affiliated with Liu Biao, the Wei Kingdom, and the Wu Kingdom. Cai He lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

Fact vs Fiction
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Was never at Chibi or killed, like the rest of the Cai’s he simply vanished from the records when Jing fell.
Literary Appearances
Romance of the Three Kingdoms:34,46–47,49
BiographySanguo Yanyi
Used by Cai Mao to guard the east gate in case Liu Bei slipped through his plot. Later, after Cai Mao was executed by Cao Cao, Cai He was sent with Cai Zhong as pretend defectors to spy on Wu but Zhou Yu and his officers saw through the ploy. Cai He was fed information that Huang Gai, Kan Zhe and Gan Ning which to defect and when the attack started, Cai He was sacrificed to the flag.
